programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: YouTuber Jay has no problem sliding into girls' DMs but can't make connections in real life. Victoria has a thing for younger women and is after her very own Warrior Princess.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The bad blood over Bec's leaked texts is still bubbling. And more confrontation is in store when the couples swap partners for Feedback Week.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: This time, the Goggleboxers watch In with a Shout, Gordon Ramsay's Future Food Stars, Rise and Fall, Saving Our Wild Isles, Last Woman on Earth, Obsession, and Dr. Down Below.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Claire take control of their kids' school projects from Manny and Luke, while Haley and Gloria help Phil with a real estate presentation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff's plan to surprise Erica with a marriage proposal unleashes a classic romcom mix-up.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The family look for a way to honour Pops' memory.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Party Boy Groom: Reluctant Lee devises Las Vegas-style nuptials, but it's not the family church in Norfolk that his bride Anna had in mind.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A shocking discovery for Ste forces a confrontation. Jack finds himself in the middle of his feuding relatives. And a teenager refuses to take orders from their mum.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes is loved-up while Cleo's ready to let off steam. And Rex goes public wearing women's clothes, but is it too soon for Ste? Elsewhere, a teen continues to manipulate their situation.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sheep.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: In California, Gordon visits Sam's Mediterranean Kabob Room, where he tries to mend relationships between the owner, his wife and their children.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Beverly disrupts Adam's college admission plans, Erica discovers that her future father-in-law blames her for a prank she didn't pull.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam join forces to save a water park that's being threatened with closure. Wedding planning opens a rift between Beverly and Erica.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cam break the happy news that they're hoping to adopt another child. But then they realise Lily may not take well to another baby in the house.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay's relationship with the dog irritates Gloria. Phil and Luke try to master the tightrope. Cameron starts a juice fast.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The bad blood over Bec's leaked texts is still bubbling. And more confrontation is in store when the couples swap partners for Feedback Week.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dominic can't swim, but will he take the plunge with her? And how will musician James react to singer Brocarde's history of paranormal romance.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Long Beach in California to save Nino's, a failing Italian restaurant that opened in 1958 and is now under the misguided leadership of eldest son Nino.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart and Lisa get to know a homeless folk singer. Homer's attempt at DIY traps the cat in the walls of the house, so he launches a rescue bid.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa is inspired to become a vet and begins an internship at a local surgery. Marge gets a job as a crime scene cleaner but finds it traumatic.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The family help Claire prepare for her upcoming televised debate with Duane Bailey for the town council seat, but will they do more harm than good.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is so preoccupied with impressing his new business partner, Tad, that he doesn't notice when Claire thinks that Tad is being inappropriate with her.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The bad blood over Bec's leaked texts is still bubbling. And more confrontation is in store when the couples swap partners for Feedback Week.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The all-stars must record their own music videos, with lyrics they've composed themselves. Which doesn't go down well with some of the, shall we say, less musically gifted models.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons stumble across a mystery and an old enemy while they're on holiday at a peculiar island resort. Dr Hibbert drugs an otter.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa visits Capital City with Patty and Selma, where she's swept up in the city's art scene. But the big city's got an underbelly.

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Mercedes advises Theresa on how to handle Kathleen-Angel. Ro tries to comfort Rex, who takes his frustrations out on the garage. And tension sizzles between two former flames.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides she's had enough of the experts' advice and ignores them completely.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers have been watching I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Citadel, The 1% Club, Celebrity Hunted, Britain's Got Talent, Reunion Hotel and Canal Boat Diaries.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: On the box this time, SAS: Who Dares Wins, Dragons' Den, Three Families, Headspace: Guide to Sleep, Secret Crush, Lego Masters USA, This Morning and BBC News (holidays).

programme.title: First Dates
programme.sub-title: Hannah and Lee both love festivals; will they make sweet music? Mary from Liverpool is looking for a 'straight Paul O'Grady'
programme.desc: And 'edgy librarian' Olivia is on her first ever date.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Bi-curious 75-year-old Ian from North Yorkshire is looking for the perfect partner to explore his sexuality with, and 30-year-old waiter Kerry wants an experimental man.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides she's had enough of the experts' advice and ignores them completely.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers have been watching I'm a Celebrity... South Africa, Citadel, The 1% Club, Celebrity Hunted, Britain's Got Talent, Reunion Hotel and Canal Boat Diaries.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner cancels sport, art and music at the school to save cash, so the students - and the police - go on strike. With Michael Moore.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Beverly disrupts Adam's college admission plans, Erica discovers that her future father-in-law blames her for a prank she didn't pull.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam join forces to save a water park that's being threatened with closure. Wedding planning opens a rift between Beverly and Erica.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with the Groom Hunt: Groom Lee and his brother take off on a tour of Europe, telling bride Becky that if she wants to marry Lee, she has to find him first.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The first episode of the Emmy-winning comedy, shot from the perspective of an unseen documentary maker. It's not easy being part of a family these days..

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil is determined to help Luke show his mum that he's responsible enough to have the new bike they just got him, but Phil ends up being the irresponsible one.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip from Rude Tube's naughty little sister, Rude(ish) Tube, featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorbike and bicycle variety.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon visits Long Beach in California to save Nino's, a failing Italian restaurant that opened in 1958 and is now under the misguided leadership of eldest son Nino.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam makes an inspirational video about a football game against William Penn's rival. Beverly and Murray try to buy a neighbour's house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry's poison ivy causes problems for Erica and Geoff. And having Mr Glascott living next door presents a challenge for the whole family.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay helps Manny with a school fundraiser. Claire campaigns for a stop sign at a busy junction. Phil and Luke try to create a viral video. Gloria searches for Stella.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria tries to help Jay and Manny with their problems, but they're both unreceptive. Cam and Mitch are the victims of a hit-and-run accident.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides she's had enough of the experts' advice and ignores them completely.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Boxer Kirsty puts her gloves down to find love. Ambitious Rose meets Hugo, who wears a cravat but has never been on a date. And can Holly kick the habit of falling for bad boys.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The owner of the Mill Street Bistro in Ohio claims to have the best menu between New York and LA. But the diners don't agree.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Lisa signs up to participate in the future colonisation of Mars, Marge's attempt to use reverse psychology to discourage her goes badly wrong.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find romance for Smithers. Milhouse is jealous of Lisa's leading man when she's cast in the school production of Casablanca.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: After selling a house to Mitch and Cam's friends, Phil and Claire take them out for a celebratory dinner but get drunk and overshare.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: It's a day of disturbing realisations when Mitchell manages to ruin one of Jay's proudest golf moments. Gloria stumbles upon Claire's dangerous little secret.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: As Feedback Week continues, one bride decides she's had enough of the experts' advice and ignores them completely.

programme.title: America's Next Top Model
programme.desc: The remaining all-stars are off to Greece. And what better way to embrace Greece's rich, storied history and culture than modelling lingerie in a giant bowl of Greek salad.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa finds himself embroiled in a cold case when the police unearth an old coffin with his business card in it - and two bodies.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The women of Springfield take centre stage, with some special Simpsonified movie parodies including Barbie and The Chronicles of Narnia.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa meets Bleeding Gums Murphy's deaf son Monk, and decides she has to help him - whether he wants help or not.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia - Brand new series
programme.desc: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party. But apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else.

programme.title: MAFS Australia: After the Dinner Party - Brand new series
programme.desc: Alissa, David and Joel unpack the screenshot saga, with some explosive unseen footage exposing the calculated manipulation behind the leak.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Eurovision, Citadel, The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, I Kissed a Boy and The Big Celebrity Detox.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Sian, who's 24, wants a man to drive her wild, who she can love more than her beloved car. And 33-year-old fashion entrepreneur Tansel is after a woman to settle down with.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Can Olympic kickboxer Aston inspire Olympic bobsleigh athlete Jordan to turn over a new leaf and settle down? Or will his eyes wander.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Bec attempts to apologise for her text scandal at the sixth dinner party. But apparently that also involves shifting the blame onto someone else.

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers watch Eurovision, Citadel, The Greatest Auction, Family Fortunes, Open House: The Great Sex Experiment, I Kissed a Boy and The Big Celebrity Detox.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Simpsons go to London with $1000 that Bart found, but Homer crashes the hire car into the Queen and gets locked in the Tower. Tony Blair guest stars.
